scripts.dev: concurrently -n TYPES,SERVER,WEB -c yellow,blue,green "pnpm -r exec tsc -b --watch" "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.dev:old: concurrently -n TYPES,SERVER,WEB -c blue,green "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm run deploy:pib
scripts.deploy-full: pnpm run build && pnpm run deploy:pib-full
scripts.deploy:pib: pnpm run build && pnpm run deploy:server:pib && pnpm run deploy:web:pib && pnpm run deploy:restart
scripts.deploy:pib-full: pnpm run build && pnpm run deploy:server:pib-full && pnpm run deploy:web:pib && pnpm run deploy:restart
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm run deploy:web:pib && pnpm run deploy:server:pib && pnpm run deploy:restart
scripts.deploy:server: scp -r apps/server/dist/server.js apps/server/data apps/server/views apps/server/assets worsty@zeropi:/home/worsty/app/server/
scripts.deploy:server:pib-full: scp -r apps/server/dist/server.js apps/server/data apps/server/views apps/server/assets dennis@pib:/home/dennis/app/server/
scripts.deploy:restart: ssh dennis@pib "sudo systemctl restart spell-server && sudo systemctl restart spell-web"
